div1.entryFree: Luxury, lust, lasciviousness: when he most burned in heart-wished l., he preached pure maid, Compl. 314. fie on lust and l. Wiv. V, 5, 98. one all of l. Meas. V, 506. the emptying of our fathers' l. H5 III, 5, 6. urge his hateful l. and bestial appetite in change of lust, R3 III, 5, 80. how the devil l. tickles these together, Troil. V, 2, 55. a couch for l. and damned incest, Hml. I, 5, 83. to it, l. Lr. IV, 6, 119.
